arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops Kieran Tierney Arsenal hint for Monaco clash and makes Gabriel Jesus transfer claim
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta discusses Kieran Tierney's situation and emphatically responds to Gabriel Jesus transfer rumours before Wednesday's game against Monaco.

arts.ttl: football.london writers give verdict on Marcus Rashford to Arsenal or Chelsea
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with the attacker in the past, with reports over the summer claiming manager Mikel Arteta met with Rashford about a possible move to the Gunners. It's interesting, though, that it was reported in May that the Manchester United star met with Mikel Arteta ahead of the summer transfer window opening.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides injury update on five Arsenal players amid Partey and Timber blows
arts.sum: Senior right backs Ben White and Takehiro Tomiyasu are both long term absentees, while Jurrien Timber and Thomas Partey were both absent from full training on Tuesday. Mikel Arteta has provided the latest on the fitness of his squad ahead of Arsenal's Champions League clash with AS Monaco.

arts.ttl: Stan Kroenke is luring the ultra-rich to Arsenal as £550m brokers JP Morgan seal new deal
Arteta not concerned about Arsenal's open play drop-off
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta insists he is not worried about Arsenal's recent drop-off in form from open play.

arts.ttl: Fulham 1-1 Arsenal: Gunners' Premier League title chances assessed after Mikel Arteta "dagger"
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole that the Gunners are still in the Premier League title race despite the "dagger" of Sunday's draw with Fulham.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk uses just one word to describe Arsenal’s William Saliba as a player
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk and William Saliba are becoming serious rivals in the Premier League right now. Van Dijk and Saliba are constantly compared to one...

arts.ttl: Breaking Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal defender 'ready' to make injury return vs Monaco
arts.sum: "Yeah he's ready and training really well and he's going to have an opportunity for sure the way the team is looking at the moment," Arteta said on Tuesday when asked about Tierney. Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has confirmed that Kieran Tierney is ready to make his long-awaited return from injury for the Champions League clash against Monaco.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's key reason for adding axed Man Utd chief Dan Ashworth on shortlist to replace Edu
arts.sum: Both Arsenal and Manchester United are without sporting directors following the respective exits of Edu and Dan Ashworth and the Gunners could potentially move for the latter

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye Dan Ashworth after shock Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Arsenal eye Dan Ashworth after shock Man Utd exit Arsenal are have added Dan Ashworth to their shortlist of potential sporting directors, according to a report.
